stories.title: From Broken Pipeline to Board Seat
stories.subtitle: How diagnosing HeartStamp's AI failures led to pivoting their entire model strategy — and a board seat.
stories.companyContext: a 30-person AI-powered greeting card startup with an ambitious generative AI vision that needed both technical and strategic direction
stories.outcome: Diagnosed LoRA training failures, pivoted the company to a model-agnostic prompting system using art historical vocabulary, guided MVP launch, and joined as Board Member.

stories.title: Architecting FarmVille
stories.subtitle: Lead ActionScript architect for the game that defined social gaming and reached 80 million monthly players.
stories.companyContext: Zynga, building what would become the most viral social game in history on the Facebook platform
stories.outcome: Designed and built the client-side ActionScript architecture for FarmVille, which reached 80+ million monthly players and defined the social gaming category.

stories.title: Rally the Team, Own the Wave
stories.subtitle: How a company layoff in 1996 led to founding a game studio, publishing with Activision, and eventually owning the definitive Flash developer community.
stories.companyContext: a team of game developers rallied after a company layoff, evolved into a studio that rode two technology waves — PC gaming and then interactive web
stories.outcome: Founded Satori Interactive in 1996, shipped games with Activision and Viacom, pivoted to Flash, acquired ActionScript.com, rebranded in 2003, and ran the definitive Flash developer community for nearly two decades.

stories.title: Building the AI Art Community
stories.subtitle: A decade of neural network research, 300+ articles on art movements, and one well-timed community launch.
stories.companyContext: the generative AI art explosion of 2023 — and the decade of ML research and art historical study that preceded it
stories.outcome: Founded StyleGuideAI, grew a 1,000+ member AI artist community, developed systematic approaches to AI art direction, and built the reputation that led directly to the HeartStamp engagement.

stories.title: 300 Articles, One Obsession
stories.subtitle: How writing deeply about every major art movement for a decade built a systematic vocabulary for AI image generation.
stories.companyContext: a decade of self-directed art historical research culminating in 300+ published articles on art movements and AI generation techniques
stories.outcome: Built a systematic art-historical prompt vocabulary, published 300+ articles on Medium, and established the domain expertise that powers StyleGuideAI's consulting practice.

stories.title: The Spec Is the System
stories.subtitle: Why vague AI instructions are a liability — and the framework I built to fix that.
stories.companyContext: enterprise AI deployments where long-running agents were producing technically impressive but fundamentally wrong outputs
stories.outcome: Developed the AI Fluency Ladder and Five Pillars of Specification Engineering framework, published as a Medium article, and shipped an open-source Claude skill (specify) that implements the full workflow.

stories.title: When the Tool Is Its Own Proof
stories.subtitle: Building an open-source Claude skill that implements the Specification Engineering framework — and discovering the SKILL.md is itself a spec.
stories.companyContext: a self-directed open source project to encode the Specification Engineering framework as a reusable, deployable Claude skill
stories.outcome: Designed and shipped 'specify' — an open-source Claude skill that walks any agent task through the Five Pillars of Specification Engineering — and published it as a reusable workflow anyone can deploy.
